title: Expropriation laws applicable
doc_html:
§4624.  Expropriation laws applicable

All existing laws providing the forms and processes for expropriation of properties by municipalities and parishes shall be applicable to this Part.
doc_text:
§4624.  Expropriation laws applicable
All existing laws providing the forms and processes for expropriation of properties by municipalities and parishes shall be applicable to this Part.
